page_content:
PHILOSOPHY, POLITICS, AND ECONOMICS MAJOR

Program Director: Dan Moller, Ph.D.

The Philosophy, Politics, and Economics major brings together insights and methods from several different disciplines to help students think rigorously and creatively about pressing social and political questions. The major not only combines classes from distinct disciplines (Philosophy, Government and Politics, Public Policy, and Economics), it features courses speciﬁcally designed to integrate material from them. The skills developed in the major will be useful for careers in law, government, business, or any ﬁeld that requires rigorous reasoning with a diverse set of insights, tools, and methods.
